title: ilex nitida var. nitida
intro: Ilex nitida var. nitida, also known as the Chinese holly or evergreen holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. The leaves of Ilex nitida var. nitida have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestion, making it a valuable ingredient in various herbal preparations. Ilex nitida var. nitida is often used to make tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
